Header.promptPurpose: Design a services page header with a title (Our Services), a subheading, and a short description. Clean and professional. Header should be centered. Soft background.

Service Cards.promptPurpose: Design a services section with 3-6 service cards. Each card should have an icon, title , description, and a
link. Use a grid layout, 3-4 columns. Cards should have a subtle shadow, border-radius, and hover effect. Include a small animation on hover. Section header should be bold and centered.

Footer.promptPurpose: Design a simple footer with copyright notice, quick links, and social media icons. Soft background, dark text.
